arts.ttl: 'October trial' for Man City challenge to Premier League APT rules as Aston Villa await outcome
arts.sum: Manchester City's challenge to new rules governing Premier League commercial deals will come to trial in October, according to reports. 'October trial' for Man City challenge to Premier League APT rules as Aston Villa await outcome

arts.ttl: 'I must say': John McGinn shares what he's spotted Marcus Rashford doing at Aston Villa behind the scenes

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner makes Crystal Palace selection admission before Aston Villa FA Cup tie
arts.sum: Crystal Palace manager Oliver Glasner has waved away the idea that he'll make wholesale changes to his side when they take on Arsenal on Wednesday evening - just three days before they face off against Aston Villa in the first FA Cup semi-final of the season. Aston Villa take on Crystal Palace at Wembley in the FA Cup semi final this coming Saturday

arts.ttl: John McGinn reveals Scotland boss' bum advice he ignored and listened to his dad - 'stop daein' that f****** thing'
arts.sum: McGinn admits his backside is a major strength but Aston Villa skipper admits he's nowhere near one former star

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford has concerns raised about behaviour as Man Utd swap deal 'to be blocked'
arts.sum: Manchester United are reportedly eyeing a swap deal with Aston Villa by trading Marcus Rashford for Ollie Watkins, but one former player is not convinced Unai Emery will allow it

arts.ttl: Aston Villa are a good team but the summer transfer fee will mean we are paid well
arts.sum: Rosenborg sporting director Micke Dorsin has reiterated that his club will be well remunerated this summer should they part with talented midfielder Sverre Nypan, amid interest from Aston Villa who had him watched this week. After the game he was asked of the presence of Monchi and Villa scout Alberto Benito: “No, I didn’t know they were coming.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Blues join Man United and Man City in race to sign £64.5m goalkeeper
arts.sum: Chelsea are set to have a busy summer transfer window once again in order to strengthen their squad. Enzo Maresca made some high-profile signings like Pedro Neto, Joao Felix, Jadon Sancho and others in the summer transfer window last year. arts.ttl: How to watch Man City vs Aston Villa
arts.sum: Manchester City host Aston Villa in a huge match in the race for Champions League qualification on Tuesday April 22, live on Sky Sports.

arts.ttl: Man City 'set apart' in transfer battle for £38.7m defender amid Real Madrid, Premier League competition
arts.sum: Manchester City will reportedly face competition from a fellow Premier League Big Six club in the race to sign Lazio defender Mario Gila this summer.

arts.ttl: Man United 'plotting £38m swoop' for 'Argentine Phil Foden' as key Ruben Amorim advantage emerges
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly consider making a move for a 17-year-old Argentine starlet who has been likened to Manchester City's Phil Foden.
